description: Court record. In Hebrew. Location: Crete (Candia). Dated: Monday, 1 Tevet 5275 AM = 19 December 1514 CE. Certifying that the bearer of this document, Ahmet b. Umar (אחמט בן אומר), purchased two barrels of kosher wine and 32 wheels(?) of cheese, and that any Jew may purchase and eat these items.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
